summary.zh: 用可拖动分割线比较同一画面的前后状态。
summary.en: Compare before and after states of the same visual with a draggable divider.

definition.zh: 通过可拖动分割线在两张叠放图片之间擦拭切换，以便对比。
definition.en: A draggable boundary changes the visible share of two aligned layers for direct comparison.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

purpose.zh: 通过可拖动分割线比较同一画面的两个叠加状态。
purpose.en: Compare two overlaid states of the same visual through a draggable divider.

frequency.zh: 适合用户主动探索的低频比较任务；默认位置应立即表达差异。
frequency.en: Use for low-frequency, user-driven comparison with a default position that makes the difference immediately clear.

trigger.zh: 由拖动分割线、点击轨道或键盘方向键触发。
trigger.en: Trigger from divider drag, track click, or keyboard arrow keys.

enterExit.zh: 组件初始直接显示两个状态，拖动只改变裁切边界，不播放自动入场。
enterExit.en: Show both states immediately and let dragging change only the clipping boundary, with no automatic entrance.

interruptibility.zh: 输入中断时停在当前位置；新的指针或键盘输入从当前比例继续。
interruptibility.en: Stop at the current position on interruption and continue from that ratio on new input.

gestureRules.zh: 使用指针捕获、44px 手柄、方向键步进和 Home/End；标签说明两侧含义。
gestureRules.en: Use pointer capture, a 44px handle, arrow-key steps, Home/End, and labels describing both sides.

reducedMotion.zh: 保留可操作分割线，取消位置补间；键盘和指针仍即时更新静态裁切。
reducedMotion.en: Keep the operable divider while removing position tweening; keyboard and pointer update the static clip immediately.

reviewNotes.zh: 两张图片保持相同尺寸、构图和替代文本策略。
reviewNotes.en: Keep both images aligned in size, composition, and alt-text strategy.

reviewNotes.zh: 检查最小与最大位置仍可看清手柄。
reviewNotes.en: Keep the handle visible at minimum and maximum positions.
